slug.name: Custom slug
slug.shortDescription: Custom subdomain for your dGuild (e.g. your-slug.dguild.org).

catalog.shortDescription: The command chamber of your guild. Define identity, manage systems, and govern your domain.
catalog.longDescription: The Admin module is the foundation of every dGuild. From here, you establish your identity, configure your guild's presence, and activate systems from the Codex. It is both your throne and your control panel.

docs.overview:
The Admin module is the central authority of your guild. It defines who you are, how your guild appears, and which systems are active.

Every dGuild is created with this module — it cannot be removed.
docs.mechanics:
Stores guild metadata (name, visuals, description)

Manages module activation states

Handles subscription and billing hooks

Controls routing via slug system

Single-wallet authority (future: DAO/multisig)
docs.setup:
Set your guild name and identity

Upload branding assets

(Optional) Claim your custom slug

Explore the Codex

Activate modules
docs.pricing:
Guild registration → 19 USDC (one-time)

Custom slug → 49 USDC / year

activationInstructions.intro: Your guild begins here. Establish your banner, name your hall, and prepare to expand.
steps: Set your guild name and general information
Upload branding assets and configure visuals
Review available modules in the catalog
Activate the systems your guild requires
